description: Rogue Frontier Patch 8 (26 May 2025) — Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

items.text: Spontaneous Combustion (Flamewalker Staff): Fixed issue where the transformation could be treated as a valid target by other spells or effects

subsections.searchable_text: Spell Fixes Spontaneous Combustion (Flamewalker Staff): Fixed issue where the transformation could be treated as a valid target by other spells or effects

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where clicking a character’s name in the player context menu opened via chat could cause unintended movement

subsections.searchable_text: UI Fixes Fixed issue where clicking a character’s name in the player context menu opened via chat could cause unintended movement

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where Raid Banners could continue to reduce Fortification damage protection even after being dropped

subsections.searchable_text: Other Fixes Fixed issue where Raid Banners could continue to reduce Fortification damage protection even after being dropped
